text: A balanced diet rich in fruits, vegetables, and whole grains gives your body the energy it needs. Combine this with regular exercise, like a 30-minute walk or yoga, to keep your heart and muscles strong. But don't forget sleep: aim for 7-9 hours each night to help your body recover and your mind recharge. Mental health is just as important, so take breaks when you feel stressed. Finding a good work-life balance is key—set aside time for hobbies, friends, and relaxation. Small daily habits in these areas can lead to a healthier, happier you.
